data.title: Iran Demands Bitcoin Payments At Hormuz As Trump Says Strait Must Open 'Immediately And Completely'
data.description: During a two-week ceasefire period, Iran is set to demand shipping companies to pay tolls in Bitcoin for oil tankers traversing the Strait of Hormuz. This move directly contradicts President Trump's call for the complete and immediate opening of the waterway. Iran's Oil, Gas and Petrochemical Products Exporters' Union spokesperson, Hamid Hosseini, stated that the country aims to collect toll fees from each passing tanker for monitoring purposes and to prevent weapon transfers during the ceasefire. The toll is set at $1 per barrel of oil. Tankers are required to email authorities about their cargo, and Iran will then notify them of the toll in digital currencies.

data.title: Convocation of the General Ordinary Shareholders Meeting of SUTNTIB AB “Tewox”
data.description: In Vilnius, Lithuania, on April 8, 2026, the Management Company LORDS LB ASSET MANAGEMENT, UAB has announced the convocation of the Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders for the closed-end real estate investment company AB "Tewox" (company code 305733600). The meeting will take place on April 29, 2026, at 13:00 p.m. at the company's registered office located at Jogailos st. 4, 01116 Vilnius, Lithuania.

data.title: New memoir by CZ reignites feud with OKX's Star Xu over contract forgery and Huobi arrest, with Xu accusing him of lying.
data.description: The release of CZ's latest memoir has sparked a renewed clash with OKX founder Star Xu. Xu openly accused the Binance founder of dishonesty in statements shared on social media platform X, reigniting their ongoing feud. This feud, encompassing public accusations and disputes, has been a prominent feature in the cryptocurrency community, drawing the attention of numerous followers. The memoir's content has led to a resurgence in tensions between the two key figures, garnering significant interest and discussion within the industry.

data.title: Tanium Named a Top 50™ Cybersecurity Technology Provider by Everest Group
data.description: Tanium, based in Emeryville, California, has been recognized by Everest Group in their first Cybersecurity Top 50™ list. This prestigious ranking identifies the top cybersecurity technology providers worldwide, with Tanium being acknowledged for its significant impact on the industry. Tanium's Autonomous IT Platform, powered by AI and real-time intelligence, is revolutionizing endpoint management and security for organizations. This accolade showcases Tanium's leadership and influence, solidifying its position in the global security sector.

data.title: Pearl Introduces Ambient Voice AI Suite for Dentistry
data.description: In Los Angeles, a new technology known as Pearl Voice is revolutionizing the way doctor-patient conversations are documented. By utilizing Artificial Intelligence, Pearl Voice transforms these conversations into organized clinical notes and prepares them for chart documentation. This innovative tool is changing the game in healthcare, streamlining the process and improving efficiency for medical professionals.

data.title: ACORD Carrier M&A study finds 68% of global carrier transactions create organizational value
data.description: A recent analysis of worldwide carrier transactions completed between July 2023 and December 2025 unveiled significant changes in the factors influencing deals. The data was made public by ACORD on April 8, 2026, who is recognized as the organization establishing standards for the international insurance sector.

data.title: 77th ANNUAL CHRISTOPHER AWARD WINNERS CELEBRATE COMMUNITY, COURAGE, AND COMPASSION
data.description: Awarded in New York on April 8, 2026, a total of 19 creators have been acknowledged for their contributions in uplifting the human spirit through various mediums including films, TV programs, and books. These creators have brought to light a range of inspiring narratives, from the tales of soldiers, caregivers, and country doctors to the heartwarming stories of nonnas, teddy bears, and humorous families. The recognition was extended to 18 pieces of work targeted at adults, signifying a diverse array of content aimed at touching the hearts and minds of audiences.

data.title: CenterGate Capital Announces Partnership with Spartaco Tool Group, a Leading Provider of Professional-Grade Tools For Utility and Telecom Infrastructure
data.description: In Clover, South Carolina on April 8, 2026, CenterGate Capital, based in Austin, Texas, disclosed that its affiliate has injected funds into Spartaco Tool Group, a prominent global supplier of top-notch tools.

data.title: Save the Date: 13th Annual National Forklift Safety Day To Be In-Person and Hybrid Event
data.description: On June 9, 2026, the thirteenth annual National Forklift Safety Day will be held from 9:00 a.m. to 11:00 a.m. in Washington, D.C. Organized by the Industrial Truck Association, the event will take place at the National Press Club. This important day focuses on promoting forklift safety and raising awareness about the significance of proper usage. Stakeholders, industry professionals, and policymakers will gather for this in-person event, emphasizing the importance of safety protocols in industrial settings.

data.title: Zoom Room Appoints Jackie Mendes as Senior VP of Franchise Development
data.description: A well-established dog training brand is expanding its franchise development team by appointing Jackie Mendes as the Senior Vice President of Franchise Development. This move comes as part of the company's strategic plan for growth. Zoom Room, known for its innovative indoor dog training gym concept, made the announcement on April 8, 2026, in Los Angeles. Mendes brings a wealth of experience in franchise development to the role, and her addition is expected to play a crucial role in driving the brand's expansion efforts in the upcoming phase. Overall, the company is gearing up for the next stage of development under Mendes' leadership.

data.title: Folio Named Official Technology Platform of AAHOA Marketplace
data.description: In Durham, North Carolina, Folio, a financial operations platform tailored for the hospitality industry, was recently announced as the designated technology platform for the AAHOA Marketplace.

data.title: Kuder, in Partnership with iJAG & ABI, Scale Work-Based Learning for Iowa Students
data.description: In Des Moines, Iowa, on April 8, 2026, Kuder unveiled a groundbreaking initiative to revolutionize work-based learning (WBL) on a national level. By implementing a data-focused approach and a statewide talent pipeline strategy, Kuder aims to synchronize student interests, education institutions, and employer needs on an extensive scale. This innovative model is set to redefine how WBL is scaled nationwide, presenting a unique opportunity to bridge the gap between the workforce and education system.

data.title: VPT Rad Brings New Foss Therapy Model 812 Online to Expand HDR Capabilities
data.description: Chelmsford, Massachusetts - VPT Rad, affiliated with VPT, Inc., announces the launch of the Foss Therapy Model 812. This radiation testing service provider is excited to have this new system online, expanding their high-dose-rate capabilities. The Foss Therapy Model 812 is now operational, marking a significant milestone for VPT Rad.
